name: Crime Level Data

columns.name: Crime Code Description

description: This dataset includes all criminal offenses reported to the Colorado Springs Police Department. Each case report (incident) may have several offenses. Each offense may have multiple suspects and/or victims. Important: This dataset provided by CSPD does not apply the same counting rules as official data reported to the Colorado Bureau of Investigations and the Federal Bureau of Investigation. This means comparisons to those datasets would be inaccurate.

name: Crash Data

columns.name: Bicycle At Fault
columns.description: Indicates whether an involved bicycle was at fault in the crash

columns.name: Bicycle Involved
columns.description: Indicates whether a bicycle was involved in the crash

columns.name: Accident Number
columns.description: Number used to identify a traffic crash report in CSPD's records management system

columns.name: Driver Contributing Factor
columns.description: Conditions that contributed to the crash. Choices are determined by State of Colorado crash report form

columns.name: Vehicle Type
columns.description: Type of vehicle driven by at fault driver

columns.name: Number Injured
columns.description: Number of people injured in crash

columns.name: Gender of At Fault Person
columns.description: Gender of person determined to be at fault in the crash

columns.name: Ethnicity of At Fault Person
columns.description: Ethnicity of person determined to be at fault in the crash

columns.name: Pedestrian At Fault
columns.description: Indicates whether a pedestrian was at fault in the crash

columns.name: Pedestrian Involved
columns.description: Indicates whether a pedestrian was involved in the crash

columns.name: Motorcycle Involved
columns.description: Indicates whether a motorcycle was involved in the crash

columns.name: Number Killed
columns.description: Number of people killed in the crash

columns.name: Involved Injury
columns.description: Indicates whether crash involved injury

columns.name: Race of At Fault Person
columns.description: Race of person determined to be at fault in the crash

columns.name: Neighborhoods
columns.description: This column was automatically created in order to record in what polygon from the dataset 'Neighborhoods' (2q37-snsf) the point in column 'location_point' is located.  This enables the creation of region maps (choropleths) in the visualization canvas and data lens.

columns.name: Involved Death
columns.description: Indicates whether the crash involved the death of a person

columns.name: Citation Number
columns.description: Number used to identify a citation (ticket) in CSPD's records management system

columns.name: Citation Issued
columns.description: Indicates whether or not a citation (ticket) was issued in the crash

columns.name: Accident Date Time
columns.description: Date and time of crash

columns.name: Age of At Fault Person
columns.description: Age of person determined to be at fault in the crash

columns.name: Driver Action
columns.description: Action that best describes the driver action that led to the crash. Choices are determined by State of Colorado crash report form.

columns.name: First Harmful Event
columns.description: First point of injury or damage in the sequence of events in a traffic crash

columns.name: Crash Location
columns.description: Street address where crash occurred

columns.name: City
columns.description: City in which crash occurred

columns.name: Patrol Division
columns.description: CSPD Patrol Division in which crash occurred

columns.name: Unit Type
columns.description: Indicates whether at fault driver was in a vehicle or on a bicycle

columns.name: Motorcycle At Fault
columns.description: Indicates whether an involved motorcycle was at fault in the crash

columns.name: Zip Code
columns.description: Zip code in which crash occurred

columns.name: Location Point
columns.description: Latitude and longitude of crash location

columns.name: Zone Sector
columns.description: CSPD division and sector where crash occurred

description: This dataset contains all traffic crashes reported to CSPD . This dataset may be tied to the Tickets and Citations dataset by ticket number.

description: This dataset includes all arrests with all offenses listed for each arrest. Each offense lists the demographic information for the person arrested for that offense. There may be multiple offenses for an arrestee. This dataset should only be used for counting the number of offenses related to arrests.

name: Officer Involved Shootings_2010-2025

columns.name: Incident Time
columns.description: Time incident occurred

columns.name: Incident Date
columns.description: Date incident occurred

columns.name: CSPD Case Number (Agency Incident Number)
columns.description: Case number (may be CSPD's or the investigative agencies' number)

columns.name: Subject Arrested or Cited
columns.description: Was the subject cited for a crime or arrested/booked.

columns.name: Incident Narrative
columns.description: Brief description of the incident

columns.name: Subject Race
columns.description: Subject's race

columns.name: Officer Issued Verbal Warning Prior to Shooting
columns.description: Indicates whether or not the officer was able to give a verbal warning before shooting their firearm.

columns.name: Officer Wounded or Killed
columns.description: Did the officer sustain any injuries or was killed.

columns.name: Subject Age
columns.description: Subject's age at the date of the incident

columns.name: Subject Under the Influence
columns.description: Was the subject of the shooting under the influence of drugs and/or alcohol.

columns.name: Subject was Charged With
columns.description: The Colorado Revised Statute corresponding to the most serious charge

columns.name: Officer Age
columns.description: Officer's age at the date of the incident

columns.name: Officer Gender
columns.description: Officer's gender

columns.name: Subject Gender
columns.description: Subject's gender

columns.name: Subject Wounded or Killed
columns.description: Did the subject of the shooting sustain any injuries or was killed.

columns.name: Weapon Subject was Armed With
columns.description: Type of weapon subject was armed with

columns.name: Subject Armed
columns.description: Was the subject armed with a weapon (yes/no)

columns.name: Subject Physcial or Mental Disability
columns.description: Physical or mental disability of the person shot/shot at

columns.name: Subject Ethnicity
columns.description: Subject's ethnicity

columns.name: Most Serious Threat the Officer Perceived/ Encountered
columns.description: The reason officer(s) shot/shot at the subject (most serious threatening behavior such as subject shot at officer, pointed gun at officer, etc.).

columns.name: Primary Basis for Initial Contact
columns.description: The reason officer(s) initially contacted the subject of the shooting (response to call for service, search warrant, etc.).

columns.name: Incident Location
columns.description: Location where the incident occurred

columns.name: Officer Race
columns.description: Officer's race

columns.name: Officer Ethnicity
columns.description: Officer's ethnicity

columns.name: Incident Count
columns.description: The number CSPD uses to count the number of officer involved shootings in the dataset. Each incident may have multiple involved officers or subjects.

columns.name: Subject Designator
columns.description: The number assigned to each subject in an officer involved shooting to make it easier for consumers of the data to know whether there is more than one subject in a particular incident.

description: Data representing CSPD officer-involved shootings from 2010 to current

description: This is a data set containing tickets issued with demographic information for the ticketed person. This data set can be used for aggregating tickets by date and/or demographics.

columns.description: Number of years employed by the City of Colorado Springs; less than 1 year will show as "0"

columns.name: Position Classification
columns.description: Position classification of the sworn officer, ranging from Recruit to Chief (may also be considered "rank" of employee)

description: This dataset includes the race/ethnicity and gender of all CSPD sworn officers (also known as "peace officers," or "police officers") as of October 13, 2025.

description: This dataset contains all tickets and citations that have been issued and all of the charged offenses for each citation. One citation may include multiple offenses. Demographic information for the ticketed person is also included.

name: Use of Force Reports

columns.name: Occurred Date and Time
columns.description: Date and time force was used

columns.name: Officer's Gender
columns.description: Gender of the officer who used force

columns.name: Occurred Year
columns.description: Year force was used

columns.name: Incident Number
columns.description: Number assigned by the Computer Aided Dispatch system to each incident (aka, call for service)

columns.name: Officer Injury
columns.description: Whether officer was injured in the force incident, including pain only

columns.name: Subject Injury
columns.description: Whether subject was injured in the force incident, including pain only

columns.name: Force Report Number
columns.description: Number assigned to each force report by CSPD's force data records system

columns.name: Officer's Unit
columns.description: Officer's assignment

columns.name: Reason Force Used
columns.description: Reason force was used (only one reason per report allowed)

columns.name: Subject's Race/Ethnicity
columns.description: Race/Ethnicity of person who was the subject of force

columns.name: Subject's Gender
columns.description: Gender of the person who was the subject of force

columns.name: Subject's Age
columns.description: Subject's age at time of incident

columns.name: Subject Unique Identifier
columns.description: Unique identifier for each subject of force. This number does not exist in a CSPD system; it is computer generated.

columns.name: Officer's Race/Ethncitiy
columns.description: Race/ethnicity of the officer who used force

columns.name: Officer's Age
columns.description: Age of the officer who used force, at the time of incident

columns.name: Years Employed at CSPD
columns.description: Number of years officer was employed at CSPD, at the time of incident

columns.name: Officer Unique ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for each officer. This number does not exist in a CSPD system; it is computer generated.

description: This dataset includes each force report filed by a CSPD officer. In the vast majority of situations, each officer completes a report for each subject of force. One incident may have multiple force reports. There is an exception to how force is normally reported for incidents involving crowds where the officer cannot identify subjects. This can happen in a crowd situation because subjects often flee the scene before they can be identified and specifically included in the force report. In these si
